---
title: Counterfactual Explanations and Algorithmic Recourse for Trustworthy AI
subtitle: "Research Seminar at HBK"
venue: HBK Europe, London, UK
description: >-
  A summary of my Ph.D. research derived from my layman's talk.
date: 2026-03-11
draft: false
---

On Wednesday, March 11, 2026, I gave a short seminar at HBK Capital Management in London. You can find the slides below or click [here](presentation.html){target="_blank"} to open them in full screen. 

For the PDF version of the slides use this [link](presentation.pdf){target="_blank"} instead.

```{=html}
<iframe width="800" height="500" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" src="presentation.html"></iframe>
```
